# KUUS DESIGN — llms.txt
# Premium Luxury Concrete® Microcement Studio, Tartu, Estonia
# https://kuusdisain.ee

## About
KUUS DESIGN is a premium microcement studio based in Tartu, Estonia. Kuusdisain is the official LUXURY CONCRETE® reseller in Estonia, supplying and installing handcrafted Luxury Concrete® mineral surfaces for luxury residential and commercial interiors.

## What We Do
- Luxury Concrete® microcement flooring (seamless, over existing tiles, underfloor heating compatible)
- Luxury Concrete® microcement bathrooms (waterproof, zero-demolition renovation)
- Luxury Concrete® microcement walls and feature surfaces
- Metallic wall finishes (Oxid Metal, True Metal, Colorcrete Metal)
- Limecrete lime-based tadelakt surfaces (vapour-permeable, natural)
- Mineral furniture and custom objects
- Professional microcement installation training and certification (Tartu studio)

## Product Range (Luxury Concrete®, Spanish manufacturer)
- Concrete — two-component system (Base, Wall, Floor, Stone, Pool), floors/walls/outdoor/pools
- Monocrete — one-component system (Base, Wall, Floor)
- Easycret — ready-to-use paste (Thin, Basic, Medium)
- Concrete Pox — epoxy system, 16 colours, high abrasion resistance
- Limecrete — lime-based tadelakt system, 34-colour chart
- Metallic finishes — Colorcrete Metal, Oxid Metal, True Metal
- Primers — Primacrete family, IMPOXY®
- Sealers — Concrete Finish family, Primacrete Finish
- Pigments — Colorcrete BASE and MIX
- Care — Concrete CLEAN, PRO CLEAN, WAX, PRO WAX
- Tools — fibreglass mesh, trowels, texture rollers

## Colour Palette
Seven curated collections, 78+ colours (Colorcrete, True Metal, Oxid Metal, Gemstone, Glowing, Concrete Pox, Limecrete).
Full palette: https://kuusdisain.ee/et/colors

## Service Area
Tartu, Estonia. Serving all of Estonia and the wider Baltic region (Latvia, Lithuania), plus the EU.

## Contact
Email: studio@kuusdesign.ee
Phone: +372 555 124 12
Address: Mineral tn 124, Tartu 51003, Estonia
Studio hours: Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00

## Languages
Estonian (et) — primary, English (en), Latvian (lv), Lithuanian (lt), German (de), Russian (ru), Spanish (es), French (fr)

## Brand
Est. 2024. Studio philosophy: quiet luxury through material honesty. Every surface is hand-troweled by certified applicators, installed using professional Luxury Concrete® microcement systems. Kuusdisain is the official LUXURY CONCRETE® reseller in Estonia.
